VIRGO Project — Data

Data

The initial data release for “The VIRGO Project” is documented in Frenk et al. 2000. For snapshot outputs at 10 different redshifts for all the 4 models produced by the VIRGO project please visit MPA’s project data page or contact Adrian Jenkins.
